race.comment: MODELISTIC (7) has been finishing off nicely from miles back in his recent runs, but the last time he drew a decent gate he went close to winning in a similar race. Brad Parnham sticks with him here and the inside draw should see him settle closer. Makes plenty of appeal. CHEYNE BAY (1) is racing in good order, stepping out to 1800m last start and closing nicely in a CL3 event. This looks a little easier on paper and he can improve again getting out in distance today. Should be at peak fitness and another forward showing is on the cards. POPPY'S ROSES (11) jumped favourite last start in a 1705m maiden at Bunbury and was beaten in a photo finish. The form out of that has been strong however and CJP sticking with her is a positive sign. Can improve again out in trip and she can shed the maiden tag. IRAYCHOUX (2) is better than we saw last time out and can bounce back dropping in grade. ANNIE WARBUCKS (6) is another who can bounce back.
